form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr6) over 1609m at Hobart, beaten 30 m by Ray Dan (1:55.30) in NR 65 to 74 on March 15 at $33.80. At his previous start 9th (FT Fr1) over 2650m at Carrick, beaten 7 m by Fleetwood Rock (3:26.00) in NR 70 or better on March 8 at $4.20. Better than the latest run and from a low draw gets his chance to bounce back.
